title: update CONTRIBUTING docs with new links and new module layout

comments.body:
`golangci-lint` is complaining, only on the merge commit?!

(Previously https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2481 .)

> `golangci-lint` is complaining, only on the merge commit?!
> 
> (Previously [containers/common#2481](https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2481) .)

Uh that sucks, I have seen some weird golangci-lint stuff in the past. Of course locally it runs fine. I also just rerun the github actions to rule out a flake.
